ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jul-02-2025 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jun-04-2025 Continued To Jul-02-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Mar-24-2025 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Feb-05-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom):

Stephen N. Allred, Esq., for Annetti J. Bullock, Petitioner.

At the court's query, counsel advises of a recently filed declaration that confirms the identity of the Trust Officer, as requested by the court. The court confirmed that no one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated Dec-17-2004 is admitted to probate. Annetti J. Bullock is appointed Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Isidoor Bornstein is appointed Probate Referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for Mar-24-2025 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is filed two weeks prior, the status hearing will be taken off calendar.

Judge: Hon. Ross. C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not Reported.
